# CDE/PII Tagging: base.eada (Silver Zone)

**Table:** `silver.base.eada` (Iceberg: `base.eada`)
**Spec:** `docs/specs/full-pipeline-eada.md` §5 (Option-C amendment, 2026-04-30)
**Date:** 2026-04-30
**Agent:** @cde-tagger
**Zone:** Silver (base — normalize + integrate)
**Contract:** `governance/data-contracts/base-eada.yaml` *(to be generated by @doc-generator — embed flags below)*
**Upstream tagging:** `governance/cde-tagging/raw-eada.md` (Bronze)
**Downstream consumer:** `consumable.institution_aura` (§6 of same spec) — fused IPEDS-Finance + EADA aura table

---

## Domain Context Referenced

- `governance/domain-context.md` "Decision 3" — Option-C hybrid FTE rationale, Knight Commission per-FTE benchmarks (which use EADA's `EFTotalCount`), and the 521-institution (~25.5%) coverage gap on 2-year colleges (NJCAA / CCCAA / NWAC) where Title IX / equity questions about athletic spend are most policy-relevant.
- `docs/specs/full-pipeline-eada.md` §2 Decision 3 (amended 2026-04-30) — load-bearing for `fte_source` CDE rationale.
- `docs/specs/full-pipeline-eada.md` §5 Option-C amendment — defines COALESCE precedence, `fte_source` enum, and the per-FTE inheritance rule.
- `docs/specs/full-pipeline-eada.md` §6 — `consumable.institution_aura` (downstream consumer), aura_score formula draft, and the explicit input list (Decision 11): `endowment_per_fte`, `marketing_ratio`, `athletic_spend_per_fte`. `athletic_subsidy_ratio` is excluded from the composite but retained on the consumable as context.
- `governance/pii-scans/base-eada-pii-scan.md` — **NO PII** across all base.eada columns; institution-level aggregates only, no person-level data.
- **Applicable regulations:** NONE at the data-protection level — EADA is U.S. Department of Education-published institutional athletic finance disclosure in the public domain. Title IX / Equity in Athletics Disclosure Act is the *source* regulation governing data publication, not a downstream privacy/security regime that constrains storage. No HIPAA, FERPA (institution-level not student-level), GLBA, SOX, GDPR, CCPA, or PCI DSS exposure.
- **PII expectations:** NONE — every column is institution-level aggregate or pipeline metadata.

---

## Table Context: Why CDE Decisions Matter Here

`base.eada` is the **Silver-zone normalized EADA athletic finance table**, one row per institution-year. It serves two downstream purposes:

1. **Direct input to `consumable.institution_aura` (§6)** — the fused IPEDS-Finance + EADA aura table that produces the composite `aura_score` (Decision 11: `athletic_spend_per_fte` is one of three direct aura inputs). `athletic_subsidy_ratio` rides along as consumable context per Decision 11.
2. **Cross-source IPEDS-Finance integration anchor** — `unitid` is the join key into `base.ipeds_finance` for FTE resolution under the Option-C COALESCE strategy. The `fte_source` provenance column makes the methodological mix (annualized IPEDS FTE vs. 12-month EADA `EFTotalCount` headcount) explicit to consumers.

Per Brightsmith no-backward-propagation policy, these flags apply to `base.eada` only. `consumable.institution_aura` columns will be re-evaluated on their own merits when that contract is tagged.

---

## Columns Flagged as CDE

| # | Column | Type | Sensitivity | is_cde | Rationale | Downstream Dependent in `consumable.institution_aura` |
|---|--------|------|-------------|--------|-----------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| 1 | `unitid` | string | Public | **true** | Primary key of `base.eada`, dedup grain, and the cross-source join anchor for `LEFT JOIN base.ipeds_finance` (§5 Option-C) and the `FULL OUTER JOIN` that produces `consumable.institution_aura` (§6). No substitute — every cross-source integration in this spec resolves through `unitid`. IPEDS external standard. | `consumable.institution_aura.unitid` (primary key, FULL OUTER JOIN anchor) |
| 2 | `total_fte_enrollment` | double | Public | **true** | Output of the Option-C COALESCE (`base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment` preferred, `raw.eada.eada_fte_headcount` fallback). Denominator for **all four** per-FTE derivations on this table (`athletic_spend_per_fte`, `athletic_revenue_per_fte`, `recruiting_per_fte`, and indirectly the aura input). Wrong values silently corrupt every per-FTE figure and the downstream `aura_score`. P0 DQ-guarded (BSE-EAD-008 arithmetic invariant, BSE-EAD-013 IPEDS-preference invariant). | `consumable.institution_aura.athletic_spend_per_fte` (denominator); `aura_score` (transitively via athletic_spend_per_fte) |
| 3 | `fte_source` | string | Public | **true** | Methodological provenance enum (`'ipeds_finance'` / `'eada_fte_headcount'` / `'none'`) that consumers **must condition interpretation on** per §2 Decision 3 amendment. The two FTE definitions are NOT identical — `total_fte_enrollment` (IPEDS) is annualized, `EFTotalCount` (EADA) is 12-month headcount — so `fte_source` is the switch that lets downstream consumers stratify, filter, or reject the hybrid for methodological homogeneity. Knight Commission's published per-FTE athletic-spend benchmarks use `EFTotalCount` specifically; without `fte_source`, comparison to those benchmarks is unstratifiable. P0 DQ-guarded (BSE-EAD-009 enum + null-rate, BSE-EAD-011 distribution ~74.5/25.5, BSE-EAD-012 null-coupling, BSE-EAD-013 IPEDS-preference). | `consumable.institution_aura.fte_source` (passthrough; lets `aura_score` consumers stratify by FTE methodology) |
| 4 | `athletic_spend_per_fte` | double | Public | **true** | **Primary `aura_score` input per §6 Decision 11.** One of three direct (non-inverted) brand-gravity signals in the composite (alongside `endowment_per_fte` and `marketing_ratio`). Computed as `total_athletic_expenses / total_fte_enrollment`; inherits `fte_source` of denominator. Wrong values directly mis-rank institutions in the aura distribution and corrupt the min/max-rescaled 1–10 score. P0 DQ-guarded (BSE-EAD-004 non-negative, BSE-EAD-008 arithmetic invariant). | `consumable.institution_aura.athletic_spend_per_fte` (direct input to `aura_score` formula) |
| 5 | `athletic_subsidy_ratio` | double | Public | **true** | Context column on `consumable.institution_aura` per §6 Decision 11. Excluded from the `aura_score` composite (Decision 10 — encodes a normative judgment that duplicates ROI/ERN signal), but retained on the consumable as analytical context for stakeholders evaluating Title IX / equity / institutional-support ledger questions. Independent of `fte_source` (denominator is `total_athletic_expenses`, not FTE). P0 DQ-guarded (BSE-EAD-007 EDA-calibrated band [-3.0, 1.0]; BSE-EAD-010 EDA-calibrated distribution P50==0/P5<0/P95==0 reflecting OPE/EADA double-counting convention). Critical because consumers reading the consumable will compare it against `aura_score` to interrogate whether brand gravity is delivering outcomes. | `consumable.institution_aura.athletic_subsidy_ratio` (passthrough context column) |

**Total CDE flags: 5.**

---

## Columns Flagged as PII

**None.** Per `governance/pii-scans/base-eada-pii-scan.md`, every `base.eada` column is institution-level aggregate or pipeline metadata. `unitid` is a public IPEDS institution identifier (not a person identifier). All financial fields are institution-level totals. No person-level data exists at any grain in this table. No RLS, no column masking, no encryption-beyond-baseline.

---

## Columns Evaluated — Not Flagged (CDE-relevant subset)

| Column | Type | is_cde | Reason Not Critical |
|--------|------|--------|---------------------|
| `athletic_revenue_per_fte` | double | false | Derived per-FTE figure but **not** an `aura_score` input (Decision 11 omits it) and not a §6 consumable context column. Useful diagnostic for chaos manifest and EDA, not load-bearing for any downstream business decision. Re-evaluate at consumable layer if §6 schema expands. |
| `recruiting_per_fte` | double | false | Same logic as `athletic_revenue_per_fte` — derived per-FTE diagnostic, not an aura input, not surfaced on the consumable. |
| `total_athletic_expenses` | double | false | Raw unscaled total. The CDE is the per-FTE-normalized form (`athletic_spend_per_fte`) that actually feeds `aura_score`; the unscaled total is intermediate arithmetic guarded by BSE-EAD-008 invariant but not a consumer-facing decision input. |
| `total_athletic_revenue` | double | false | Same logic as `total_athletic_expenses` — intermediate arithmetic for `athletic_subsidy_ratio` and `athletic_revenue_per_fte`, not a downstream decision input on its own. |
| `record_id` | string | false | Deterministic Silver grain identifier; pure function of `unitid` (+ year if grain expands). Pipeline-internal dedup machinery only. |
| `source_load_date` | date | false | Bronze passthrough. Pipeline freshness metadata. Not a decision input. |
| `ingested_at` | timestamp | false | Silver promotion timestamp. Operational observability only. |

Note: this list reflects the column set implied by §5 — final column inventory is fixed when `base.eada` materializes and the data contract is generated. CDE flags above are the load-bearing five regardless of which non-CDE diagnostic columns are added.

---

## Sensitivity Classification

`public` across all `base.eada` columns. EADA is mandatory public disclosure under the Equity in Athletics Disclosure Act (20 U.S.C. § 1092(g)); IPEDS Finance fields integrated via `unitid` are likewise public. No regulated PII or PHI present.

---

## Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Spec | `docs/specs/full-pipeline-eada.md` §5 (Option-C amendment) |
| Columns flagged CDE | **5** (`unitid`, `total_fte_enrollment`, `fte_source`, `athletic_spend_per_fte`, `athletic_subsidy_ratio`) |
| Columns flagged PII | **0** |
| Sensitivity tier | `public` (all columns) |
| Regulatory frameworks triggered | None at storage layer |
| Downstream consumer | `consumable.institution_aura` (§6) — `aura_score` formula consumes `athletic_spend_per_fte` directly; `unitid` is FULL OUTER JOIN key; `fte_source` is passed through for stratification; `athletic_subsidy_ratio` is passed through as context |
| Note on `marketing_ratio` | **Not tagged here** — it is sourced from `base.ipeds_finance`, not `base.eada`. Tagged in `governance/cde-tagging/raw-ipeds-finance.md` / forthcoming silver IPEDS-Finance tagging. |

**Downstream reminder:** CDE flags do not propagate. When @cde-tagger runs on `consumable.institution_aura`, every column (`aura_score`, `aura_score_version`, `has_ipeds_finance`, the passed-through inputs) is re-evaluated on its own merits in the Gold zone.
